mapper.sql: id, token_id, capability_id, rw_class, status, approval_id, activated_at, activated_by_user_id, rejected_at, rejected_by_user_id, rejected_reason, revoked_at, revoked_reason, created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into t_r_mcp_token_scope_grant (token_id, capability_id, rw_class, status, approval_id, activated_at, activated_by_user_id, rejected_at, rejected_by_user_id, rejected_reason, revoked_at, revoked_reason, created_at) values
(#{g.tokenId}, #{g.capabilityId}, #{g.rwClass}, #{g.status}, #{g.approvalId}, #{g.activatedAt}, #{g.activatedByUserId}, #{g.rejectedAt}, #{g.rejectedByUserId}, #{g.rejectedReason}, #{g.revokedAt}, #{g.revokedReason}, coalesce(#{g.createdAt}, current_timestamp))
mapper.select: select from t_r_mcp_token_scope_grant where token_id = #{tokenId} order by id
select from t_r_mcp_token_scope_grant where token_id = #{tokenId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update t_r_mcp_token_scope_grant set status = 'REJECTED', rejected_at = #{rejectedAt}, rejected_by_user_id = #{rejectedByUserId}, rejected_reason = #{rejectedReason} where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'
